job_stories.title: Get Context-Aware Code Completion
job_stories.situation: I am writing code in a project with established patterns
job_stories.motivation: get completions that match my codebase style without manual editing
job_stories.outcome: I can accept suggestions that fit naturally into my code

acceptance_criteria.given: I am typing in a TypeScript file
acceptance_criteria.when: I pause after typing a partial function name
acceptance_criteria.then: Ghost text appears within 100ms showing the top completion matching project naming conventions
The suggestion is accepted and inserted at the cursor position

acceptance_criteria.given: I want to see alternative completions
acceptance_criteria.then: A ranked list of up to 5 alternatives appears with confidence indicators

acceptance_criteria.given: The project uses camelCase for functions and PascalCase for classes
acceptance_criteria.when: I start typing a new function or class
acceptance_criteria.then: Suggestions follow the correct casing convention for the symbol type

job_stories.title: Auto-Import from Correct Modules
job_stories.situation: I am using a symbol that needs to be imported
job_stories.motivation: have the correct import added automatically without hunting for the right path
job_stories.outcome: the import statement is added following my project's import conventions

acceptance_criteria.given: I accept a completion for a symbol not yet imported
acceptance_criteria.then: The corresponding import statement is auto-added at the top of the file

acceptance_criteria.given: A symbol is exported from both a local module and node_modules
acceptance_criteria.then: The local module import is preferred over the external package

acceptance_criteria.given: The project uses barrel file re-exports (index.ts)
acceptance_criteria.then: The import uses the barrel file path, not the deep file path
The import uses the configured path alias, not relative paths

job_stories.title: Learn and Apply Project Conventions
job_stories.situation: the codebase has been indexed and I have been coding for a while
job_stories.motivation: have suggestions that improve over time as the tool learns my patterns
job_stories.outcome: completions feel like they were written by someone who knows the codebase

acceptance_criteria.given: I have accepted and rejected multiple suggestions
acceptance_criteria.then: Accepted patterns are ranked higher and rejected patterns are deprioritized

acceptance_criteria.given: The project follows a service/repository architecture
acceptance_criteria.when: I create a new file in the services directory
acceptance_criteria.then: Suggestions include the standard service class structure used in other service files

acceptance_criteria.given: A file is modified and saved
acceptance_criteria.when: The file watcher detects the change
acceptance_criteria.then: The index is incrementally updated within 2 seconds reflecting the new code
